_comment: AgentPulse import format. Fill in 'runs'. Each run is one execution of your multi-agent system. Only 'steps' (the ordered agent turns) are required per run; AgentPulse derives totals, cost, sequence, handoffs, and the parallel DAG for you. Import with: python scripts/import_runs.py thisfile.json

runs.task_text: Analyze AAPL and recommend a position

_field_notes.db_name: Logical name -> writes db/<db_name>.db. The dashboard sidebar lists every db/*.db.
_field_notes.run_id: Optional. Any unique string. Auto-generated (UUID) if omitted.
_field_notes.task_type: Groups like-with-like for drift/anomaly comparison. Keep it stable across runs of the same workflow.
_field_notes.prompt_version: Integer. Bump it when you change prompts so the dashboard can show version drift. Baseline is 1.
_field_notes.timestamp: ISO-8601. Optional (defaults to now). Use real times so the trends window works.
_field_notes.status: OK or ERROR for the whole run.
_field_notes.termination_reason: Free text, e.g. 'completed', 'error', 'max_rounds'. Anything not clean is flagged.
_field_notes.steps[].agent: Required. The agent/node name for this turn.
_field_notes.steps[].model: Model id (e.g. claude-sonnet-4-6, gpt-4o). Drives cost. Leave '' for non-LLM steps.
_field_notes.steps[].input_tokens / output_tokens: Per-step token counts. 0 for steps that made no LLM call.
_field_notes.steps[].start_time_ms / duration_ms: Timing. start_time_ms is relative to run start (or epoch ms) — use equal start times for steps that ran in parallel. If start_time_ms is omitted, steps are laid end-to-end.
_field_notes.steps[].status: OK or ERROR for this step. Optional (default OK).
_field_notes.steps[].parallel_group: Optional. Give the SAME label to consecutive steps that ran concurrently; AgentPulse turns them into a fan-out group, with the prior step as the fan-out parent and the next step as the join.
_field_notes.steps[].tools: Optional list of {name, success, duration_ms} for tool calls this step made.
_field_notes.steps[].llm_retries: Optional integer — how many times this step's LLM call was retried (transient error / failed parse). Feeds the retry-rate drift signal. Default 0.
_field_notes.steps[].config: Optional object describing this step's config for change tracking / versioning: {params: {temperature, max_tokens}, tools: [names available], system_prompt: '...'}. model comes from steps[].model. system_prompt is hashed (system-message-only). Lets the dashboard detect when prompt/model/tools/params changed.
